item.title: LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Knuckles’ Guardian Mech Action Figure Toy for Kids Boys & Girls with Video Game Character Figures Incl. Knuckles and Rouge the Bat Plus a Master Emerald Fun Gift Idea 76996
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Knuckles’ Guardian Mech Action Figure Toy for Kids Boys & Girls with Video Game Character Figures Incl. Knuckles and Rouge the Bat Plus a Master Emerald Fun Gift Idea 76996 here: ℹ️: Guardian mech – Features a buildable mech action figure with dual blasters, a glider and a Master Emerald, plus Knuckles and Rouge the Bat LEGO Sonic adventures – This fun set lets fans expand their play endlessly by adding it to other LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog toys (sold separately) Sonic toys – Treat kids aged 8+ with this Knuckles’ Guardian Mech playset packed with options to inspire stories with iconic video game characters Creative toys – All of the LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog sets introduce kids to fast action fun and imaginative play with different story possibilities Gifts for gamers – This buildable gift for boys and girls aged 8+ enhances kids storytelling play with functions including a platform on the glider to hold the Master Emerald Knuckles toy – The posable mech Sonic figure with large punching fists inspires kids’ adventure play and is easy to take on gaming fans’ playdates 🛒 Buy it now!
